Question: How many TNBC new patients were prescribed Trodelvy by Tier 1 HCPs?
Correct Code: WITH Tier1_Prescribers AS (SELECT DISTINCT NPI_HCP_number FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE NPI_HCP_tier ILIKE 'Tier 1'), Trodelvy_Prescriptions AS (SELECT SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS total_monthly_adjusted_count FROM (SELECT DISTINCT patient_id, NPI_HCP_number, Monthly_Adjusted_Count FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE regimen_grouped_name ILIKE '%trodelvy%' AND new_patient_flag = '1' AND NPI_HCP_number IN (SELECT NPI_HCP_number FROM Tier1_Prescribers)) trodelvy_data) SELECT total_monthly_adjusted_count FROM Trodelvy_Prescriptions;

Question: How many prescribers with more than one new TNBC patient in the last quarter prescribed Trodelvy?
Correct Code: WITH Max_Date AS (SELECT MAX(CAST(Year_Month AS INT)) AS max_date FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE indication ILIKE 'TNBC'), Last_Full_Quarter AS (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', add_months(TO_DATE(CAST(max_date AS STRING) || '01', 'yyyyMMdd'), -3)) AS start_of_last_quarter, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', TO_DATE(CAST(max_date AS STRING) || '01', 'yyyyMMdd')) AS start_of_current_quarter FROM Max_Date), Quarterly_Data AS (SELECT NPI_HCP_number, SUM(monthly_adjusted_count) AS total_patient_count FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE indication ILIKE 'TNBC' AND new_patient_flag = '1' AND regimen_start_date >= (SELECT start_of_last_quarter FROM Last_Full_Quarter) AND regimen_start_date < (SELECT start_of_current_quarter FROM Last_Full_Quarter) GROUP BY NPI_HCP_number HAVING SUM(monthly_adjusted_count) > 1), Trodelvy_Prescribers AS (SELECT DISTINCT NPI_HCP_number FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE indication ILIKE 'TNBC' AND regimen_grouped_name ILIKE '%Trodelvy%' AND regimen_start_date >= (SELECT start_of_last_quarter FROM Last_Full_Quarter) AND regimen_start_date < (SELECT start_of_current_quarter FROM Last_Full_Quarter)) SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT q.NPI_HCP_number) AS prescribers_with_trodelvy FROM Quarterly_Data q JOIN Trodelvy_Prescribers t ON q.NPI_HCP_number = t.NPI_HCP_number;

Question: What is the patient count by regimen group in LOT 2 for Tier 1 HCPs in TNBC over the past year?
Correct Code: WITH Max_Date AS (SELECT MAX(CAST(Year_Month AS INT)) AS max_date FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE indication ILIKE 'TNBC'), Filtered_Data AS (SELECT t.regimen_grouped_name, SUM(t.Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS patient_count FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` t WHERE t.Line_of_Therapy_LOT = 2 AND t.NPI_HCP_tier = 'Tier 1' AND CAST(t.Year_Month AS INT) >= (SELECT max_date FROM Max_Date) - 12 AND t.indication ILIKE 'TNBC' GROUP BY t.regimen_grouped_name) SELECT regimen_grouped_name, patient_count FROM Filtered_Data ORDER BY patient_count DESC;

Question: Show yearly patient trends of prescribers who initiated Trodelvy for most of their new TNBC patients?
Correct Code: WITH Max_Date AS (SELECT MAX(CAST(Year_Month AS INT)) AS max_date FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE indication ILIKE 'TNBC'), New_Patients AS (SELECT DISTINCT NPI_HCP_number, patient_id, regimen_grouped_name, regimen_start_date, Monthly_Adjusted_Count, Year_Month AS patient_year_month FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE new_patient_flag = '1' AND indication ILIKE 'TNBC'), Trodelvy_Patients AS (SELECT NPI_HCP_number, SUM(CASE WHEN regimen_grouped_name ILIKE '%Trodelvy%' THEN Monthly_Adjusted_Count ELSE 0 END) AS trodelvy_nps FROM New_Patients GROUP BY NPI_HCP_number), Total_Patients AS (SELECT NPI_HCP_number, SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS total_nps FROM New_Patients GROUP BY NPI_HCP_number), Prescriber_Trodelvy_Share AS (SELECT t.NPI_HCP_number, t.trodelvy_nps, tp.total_nps, (t.trodelvy_nps * 100.0) / NULLIF(tp.total_nps, 0) AS trodelvy_percentage FROM Trodelvy_Patients t JOIN Total_Patients tp ON t.NPI_HCP_number = tp.NPI_HCP_number), Filtered_Prescribers AS (SELECT NPI_HCP_number FROM Prescriber_Trodelvy_Share WHERE trodelvy_percentage > 50) SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(CAST(patient_year_month AS STRING), 'yyyyMM')) AS year, SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS yearly_total FROM New_Patients WHERE NPI_HCP_number IN (SELECT NPI_HCP_number FROM Filtered_Prescribers) AND regimen_grouped_name ILIKE '%Trodelvy%' GROUP BY year ORDER BY year;

Question: Show the TPS distribution by regimen group in LOT 2 and Tier 1 HCPs for TNBC in 2024.
Correct Code: WITH Max_Date AS (SELECT MAX(CAST(Year_Month AS INT)) AS max_date FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE indication ILIKE 'TNBC'), Tier1_HCPs AS (SELECT DISTINCT NPI_HCP_number FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE NPI_HCP_tier = 'Tier 1'), TPS_Distribution AS (SELECT regimen_grouped_name, SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS total_tps FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE Line_of_Therapy_LOT = '2' AND NPI_HCP_number IN (SELECT NPI_HCP_number FROM Tier1_HCPs) AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(CAST(Year_Month AS STRING), 'yyyymm')) = 2024 GROUP BY regimen_grouped_name) SELECT regimen_grouped_name, total_tps, ROUND((total_tps * 100.0) / NULLIF(SUM(total_tps) OVER (), 0), 2) AS tps_percentage FROM TPS_Distribution ORDER BY total_tps DESC;

Question: Compare the total patient count and Trodelvy patient count for 2L+ in TNBC over R6M?
Correct Code: WITH Max_Date AS (SELECT MAX(CAST(Year_Month AS INT)) AS max_date FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE indication ILIKE 'TNBC'), Total_TNBC_2Lplus AS (SELECT SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS total_2Lplus_patients FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE Line_of_Therapy_LOT >= 2 AND CAST(Year_Month AS INT) >= (SELECT max_date FROM Max_Date) - 6 AND indication ILIKE 'TNBC'), Trodelvy_TNBC_2Lplus AS (SELECT SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS trodelvy_2Lplus_patients FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE regimen_grouped_name ILIKE '%Trodelvy%' AND Line_of_Therapy_LOT >= 2 AND CAST(Year_Month AS INT) >= (SELECT max_date FROM Max_Date) - 6 AND indication ILIKE 'TNBC') SELECT total_2Lplus_patients, trodelvy_2Lplus_patients, ROUND((trodelvy_2Lplus_patients * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_2Lplus_patients, 0)), 2) AS trodelvy_share_percent FROM Total_TNBC_2Lplus, Trodelvy_TNBC_2Lplus;

Question: What is the total patient count by LOT for each adoption segment in TNBC?
Correct Code: WITH Total_NPS AS (SELECT NPI_HCP_number, Line_of_Therapy_LOT AS LOT, SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS total_patients FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE new_patient_flag = '1' GROUP BY NPI_HCP_number, Line_of_Therapy_LOT), Trodelvy_NPS AS (SELECT NPI_HCP_number, Line_of_Therapy_LOT AS LOT, SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS trodelvy_patients FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE regimen_grouped_name ILIKE '%Trodelvy%' AND new_patient_flag = '1' GROUP BY NPI_HCP_number, Line_of_Therapy_LOT), HCP_Share AS (SELECT t.NPI_HCP_number, t.LOT, COALESCE(tn.trodelvy_patients, 0) AS trodelvy_patients, t.total_patients, ROUND((COALESCE(tn.trodelvy_patients, 0) * 100.0 / NULLIF(t.total_patients, 0)), 2) AS trodelvy_share FROM Total_NPS t LEFT JOIN Trodelvy_NPS tn ON t.NPI_HCP_number = tn.NPI_HCP_number AND t.LOT = tn.LOT), Adoption_Segments AS (SELECT NPI_HCP_number, LOT, trodelvy_patients, total_patients, trodelvy_share, CASE WHEN trodelvy_share >= 40 THEN 'Adopter' WHEN trodelvy_share > 0 AND trodelvy_share < 40 THEN 'Dabbler' ELSE 'Non-User' END AS segment FROM HCP_Share) SELECT segment, LOT, SUM(total_patients) AS total_patients FROM Adoption_Segments GROUP BY segment, LOT ORDER BY segment, LOT;

Question: What is the monthly trend in the number of Adopters prescribing Trodelvy for mTNBC 2L+ patients from Jan 2023 to Dec 2023?
Correct Code: WITH Max_Date AS (SELECT MAX(CAST(Year_Month AS INT)) AS max_date FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE indication ILIKE 'TNBC'), Total_NPS AS (SELECT NPI_HCP_number, TO_DATE(CAST(Year_Month AS STRING), 'yyyyMM') AS month, SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS total_patients FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE Line_of_Therapy_LOT >= 2 AND new_patient_flag = '1' AND CAST(Year_Month AS INT) BETWEEN (SELECT max_date FROM Max_Date) - 12 AND (SELECT max_date FROM Max_Date) AND indication ILIKE 'TNBC' GROUP BY NPI_HCP_number, month), Trodelvy_NPS AS (SELECT NPI_HCP_number, TO_DATE(CAST(Year_Month AS STRING), 'yyyyMM') AS month, SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS trodelvy_patients FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE regimen_grouped_name ILIKE '%Trodelvy%' AND Line_of_Therapy_LOT >= 2 AND new_patient_flag = '1' AND CAST(Year_Month AS INT) BETWEEN (SELECT max_date FROM Max_Date) - 12 AND (SELECT max_date FROM Max_Date) AND indication ILIKE 'TNBC' GROUP BY NPI_HCP_number, month), HCP_Share AS (SELECT t.NPI_HCP_number, t.month, COALESCE(tn.trodelvy_patients, 0) AS trodelvy_patients, t.total_patients, ROUND((COALESCE(tn.trodelvy_patients, 0) * 100.0 / NULLIF(t.total_patients, 0)), 2) AS trodelvy_share FROM Total_NPS t LEFT JOIN Trodelvy_NPS tn ON t.NPI_HCP_number = tn.NPI_HCP_number AND t.month = tn.month), Adoption_Segments AS (SELECT NPI_HCP_number, month, trodelvy_patients, total_patients, trodelvy_share, CASE WHEN trodelvy_share >= 40 THEN 'Adopter' WHEN trodelvy_share > 0 AND trodelvy_share < 40 THEN 'Dabbler' ELSE 'Non-User' END AS segment FROM HCP_Share) SELECT month, COUNT(DISTINCT NPI_HCP_number) AS num_adopters FROM Adoption_Segments WHERE segment = 'Adopter' GROUP BY month ORDER BY month;

Question: What is the monthly trend of TRO patients of the top 5 adopters in HR+/HER2- in R12M?
Correct Code: WITH Max_Date AS (SELECT MAX(CAST(Year_Month AS INT)) AS max_date FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE indication ILIKE 'HR+/HER2-'), Total_NPS AS (SELECT NPI_HCP_number, TO_DATE(CAST(Year_Month AS STRING), 'yyyyMM') AS month, SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS total_patients FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE CAST(Year_Month AS INT) >= (SELECT max_date FROM Max_Date) - 12 AND new_patient_flag = '1' AND indication ILIKE 'HR+/HER2-' GROUP BY NPI_HCP_number, month), Trodelvy_NPS AS (SELECT NPI_HCP_number, TO_DATE(CAST(Year_Month AS STRING), 'yyyyMM') AS month, SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS trodelvy_patients FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE regimen_grouped_name ILIKE '%Trodelvy%' AND new_patient_flag = '1' AND CAST(Year_Month AS INT) >= (SELECT max_date FROM Max_Date) - 12 AND indication ILIKE 'HR+/HER2-' GROUP BY NPI_HCP_number, month), HCP_Share AS (SELECT t.NPI_HCP_number, t.month, COALESCE(tn.trodelvy_patients, 0) AS trodelvy_patients, t.total_patients, ROUND((COALESCE(tn.trodelvy_patients, 0) * 100.0 / NULLIF(t.total_patients, 0)), 2) AS trodelvy_share FROM Total_NPS t LEFT JOIN Trodelvy_NPS tn ON t.NPI_HCP_number = tn.NPI_HCP_number AND t.month = tn.month), Adoption_Segments AS (SELECT NPI_HCP_number, month, trodelvy_patients, total_patients, trodelvy_share, CASE WHEN trodelvy_share >= 40 THEN 'Adopter' WHEN trodelvy_share > 0 AND trodelvy_share < 40 THEN 'Dabbler' ELSE 'Non-User' END AS segment FROM HCP_Share), Top_5_Adopters AS (SELECT NPI_HCP_number FROM Adoption_Segments WHERE segment = 'Adopter' GROUP BY NPI_HCP_number ORDER BY SUM(trodelvy_patients) DESC LIMIT 5) SELECT a.month, a.NPI_HCP_number, SUM(a.trodelvy_patients) AS total_trodelvy_patients FROM Adoption_Segments a JOIN Top_5_Adopters t ON a.NPI_HCP_number = t.NPI_HCP_number GROUP BY a.month, a.NPI_HCP_number ORDER BY a.month, total_trodelvy_patients DESC;

Question: What is the monthly trend of Trodelvy patients in 4L+ for each adoption segment in HR+/HER2- in last year?
Correct Code: WITH Max_Date AS (SELECT MAX(CAST(Year_Month AS INT)) AS max_date FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE indication ILIKE 'HR+/HER2-'), Total_NPS AS (SELECT NPI_HCP_number, TO_DATE(CAST(Year_Month AS STRING), 'yyyyMM') AS month, SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS total_patients FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE Line_of_Therapy_LOT >= 4 AND CAST(Year_Month AS INT) >= (SELECT max_date FROM Max_Date) - 12 AND new_patient_flag = '1' AND indication ILIKE 'HR+/HER2-' GROUP BY NPI_HCP_number, month), Trodelvy_NPS AS (SELECT NPI_HCP_number, TO_DATE(CAST(Year_Month AS STRING), 'yyyyMM') AS month, SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS trodelvy_patients FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE regimen_grouped_name ILIKE '%Trodelvy%' AND Line_of_Therapy_LOT >= 4 AND new_patient_flag = '1' AND CAST(Year_Month AS INT) >= (SELECT max_date FROM Max_Date) - 12 AND indication ILIKE 'HR+/HER2-' GROUP BY NPI_HCP_number, month), HCP_Share AS (SELECT t.NPI_HCP_number, t.month, COALESCE(tn.trodelvy_patients, 0) AS trodelvy_patients, t.total_patients, ROUND((COALESCE(tn.trodelvy_patients, 0) * 100.0 / NULLIF(t.total_patients, 0)), 2) AS trodelvy_share FROM Total_NPS t LEFT JOIN Trodelvy_NPS tn ON t.NPI_HCP_number = tn.NPI_HCP_number AND t.month = tn.month), Adoption_Segments AS (SELECT NPI_HCP_number, month, trodelvy_patients, total_patients, trodelvy_share, CASE WHEN trodelvy_share >= 40 THEN 'Adopter' WHEN trodelvy_share > 0 AND trodelvy_share < 40 THEN 'Dabbler' ELSE 'Non-User' END AS segment FROM HCP_Share) SELECT month, segment, COUNT(DISTINCT NPI_HCP_number) AS num_hcps, SUM(trodelvy_patients) AS total_trodelvy_patients FROM Adoption_Segments GROUP BY month, segment ORDER BY month, segment;

Question: What is the TRO 4L+ new patient starts for Adopters in HR+/HER2-?
Correct Code: WITH Total_NPS AS (SELECT NPI_HCP_number, SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS total_patients FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE new_patient_flag = '1' GROUP BY NPI_HCP_number), Trodelvy_NPS AS (SELECT NPI_HCP_number, SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS trodelvy_patients FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE regimen_grouped_name ILIKE '%Trodelvy%' AND new_patient_flag = '1' AND indication ILIKE 'HR+/HER2-' GROUP BY NPI_HCP_number), HCP_Share AS (SELECT t.NPI_HCP_number, COALESCE(tn.trodelvy_patients, 0) AS trodelvy_patients, t.total_patients, ROUND((COALESCE(tn.trodelvy_patients, 0) * 100.0 / NULLIF(t.total_patients, 0)), 2) AS trodelvy_share FROM Total_NPS t LEFT JOIN Trodelvy_NPS tn ON t.NPI_HCP_number = tn.NPI_HCP_number), Adopters AS (SELECT NPI_HCP_number FROM HCP_Share WHERE trodelvy_share >= 40), Filtered_Trodelvy_4L_Plus AS (SELECT t.NPI_HCP_number, SUM(t.Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS trodelvy_nps_4l_plus FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` t JOIN Adopters a ON t.NPI_HCP_number = a.NPI_HCP_number WHERE t.regimen_grouped_name ILIKE '%Trodelvy%' AND t.Line_of_Therapy_LOT >= 4 AND t.new_patient_flag = '1' GROUP BY t.NPI_HCP_number) SELECT SUM(trodelvy_nps_4l_plus) AS total_trodelvy_4l_plus_new_patient_starts FROM Filtered_Trodelvy_4L_Plus;

Question: Compare TRO NPS share between Q1 2024 and Q2 2024 among dabblers in TNBC
Correct Code: WITH Filtered_Data AS (SELECT NPI_HCP_number, regimen_start_date, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM regimen_start_date) AS year, EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM regimen_start_date) AS quarter, Monthly_Adjusted_Count, regimen_grouped_name, new_patient_flag FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data`), Total_NPS_HCP_Q1_Q2 AS (SELECT NPI_HCP_number, year, quarter, SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS total_nps FROM Filtered_Data WHERE new_patient_flag = '1' AND year = 2024 AND quarter IN (1, 2) GROUP BY NPI_HCP_number, year, quarter), Trodelvy_NPS_HCP_Q1_Q2 AS (SELECT NPI_HCP_number, year, quarter, SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS trodelvy_nps FROM Filtered_Data WHERE new_patient_flag = '1' AND regimen_grouped_name ILIKE '%Trodelvy%' AND year = 2024 AND quarter IN (1, 2) GROUP BY NPI_HCP_number, year, quarter), Dabbler_HCPs AS (SELECT t.NPI_HCP_number, t.year, t.quarter, t.total_nps, COALESCE(tr.trodelvy_nps, 0) AS trodelvy_nps, ROUND(COALESCE(tr.trodelvy_nps, 0) * 100.0 / NULLIF(t.total_nps, 0), 2) AS trodelvy_share FROM Total_NPS_HCP_Q1_Q2 t LEFT JOIN Trodelvy_NPS_HCP_Q1_Q2 tr ON t.NPI_HCP_number = tr.NPI_HCP_number AND t.year = tr.year AND t.quarter = tr.quarter WHERE ROUND(COALESCE(tr.trodelvy_nps, 0) * 100.0 / NULLIF(t.total_nps, 0), 2) > 0 AND ROUND(COALESCE(tr.trodelvy_nps, 0) * 100.0 / NULLIF(t.total_nps, 0), 2) < 40) SELECT year, quarter, SUM(trodelvy_nps) AS total_trodelvy_nps, SUM(total_nps) AS total_nps, ROUND(SUM(trodelvy_nps) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(total_nps), 0), 2) AS trodelvy_nps_share FROM Dabbler_HCPs GROUP BY year, quarter ORDER BY year, quarter;

Question: What is the TRO NPS share by Adoption segment in TNBC in Q1 2024?
Correct Code: WITH Total_NPS_HCP_Q1 AS (SELECT NPI_HCP_number, SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS total_nps FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE new_patient_flag = '1' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM regimen_start_date) = 2024 AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM regimen_start_date) = 1 GROUP BY NPI_HCP_number), Trodelvy_NPS_HCP_Q1 AS (SELECT NPI_HCP_number, SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS trodelvy_nps FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE regimen_grouped_name ILIKE '%Trodelvy%' AND new_patient_flag = '1' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM regimen_start_date) = 2024 AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM regimen_start_date) = 1 GROUP BY NPI_HCP_number), HCP_Segments AS (SELECT t.NPI_HCP_number, t.total_nps, COALESCE(tr.trodelvy_nps, 0) AS trodelvy_nps, ROUND(COALESCE(tr.trodelvy_nps, 0) * 100.0 / NULLIF(t.total_nps, 0), 2) AS trodelvy_share, CASE WHEN ROUND(COALESCE(tr.trodelvy_nps, 0) * 100.0 / NULLIF(t.total_nps, 0), 2) >= 40 THEN 'Adopter' WHEN ROUND(COALESCE(tr.trodelvy_nps, 0) * 100.0 / NULLIF(t.total_nps, 0), 2) > 0 THEN 'Dabbler' ELSE 'Non-user' END AS hcp_category FROM Total_NPS_HCP_Q1 t LEFT JOIN Trodelvy_NPS_HCP_Q1 tr ON t.NPI_HCP_number = tr.NPI_HCP_number) SELECT hcp_category, SUM(trodelvy_nps) AS total_trodelvy_nps, SUM(total_nps) AS total_nps, ROUND(SUM(trodelvy_nps) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(total_nps), 0), 2) AS trodelvy_nps_share FROM HCP_Segments GROUP BY hcp_category ORDER BY trodelvy_nps_share DESC;

Question: What is Trodelvy's TPS share in the TNBC market in R6M by each adoption segment (Adopters, Dabblers, Non-users)?
Correct Code: WITH Max_Date AS (SELECT MAX(regimen_start_date) AS max_date FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE indication = 'TNBC'), R6M_TNBC_Patients AS (SELECT NPI_HCP_number, SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS total_patients, SUM(CASE WHEN regimen_grouped_name ILIKE '%Trodelvy%' THEN Monthly_Adjusted_Count ELSE 0 END) AS trodelvy_patients FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE regimen_start_date >= DATE_ADD(MONTH, -6, (SELECT max_date FROM Max_Date)) AND indication = 'TNBC' GROUP BY NPI_HCP_number), Adoption_Segment AS (SELECT NPI_HCP_number, total_patients, trodelvy_patients, ROUND((trodelvy_patients * 100.0) / NULLIF(total_patients, 0), 2) AS trodelvy_share, CASE WHEN ROUND((trodelvy_patients * 100.0) / NULLIF(total_patients, 0), 2) >= 40 THEN 'Adopter' WHEN ROUND((trodelvy_patients * 100.0) / NULLIF(total_patients, 0), 2) > 0 THEN 'Dabbler' ELSE 'Non-user' END AS adoption_segment FROM R6M_TNBC_Patients) SELECT adoption_segment, COUNT(DISTINCT NPI_HCP_number) AS total_physicians, SUM(trodelvy_patients) AS total_trodelvy_patients, ROUND((SUM(trodelvy_patients) * 100.0) / NULLIF(SUM(total_patients), 0), 2) AS trodelvy_tps_share FROM Adoption_Segment GROUP BY adoption_segment ORDER BY trodelvy_tps_share DESC;

Question: What is the yearly trend of trodelvy new patients in TNBC?
Correct Code: WITH Max_Date AS ( SELECT MAX(CAST(Year_Month AS INT)) AS max_date FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE indication ILIKE 'TNBC') SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(CAST(Year_Month AS STRING), 'yyyyMM')) AS year,SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS yearly_total FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE indication ILIKE 'TNBC' AND product_name ILIKE 'TRODELVY' AND new_patient_flag = '1' AND CAST(Year_Month AS INT) >= 202301 AND CAST(Year_Month AS INT) <= (SELECT max_date FROM Max_Date) GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(CAST(Year_Month AS STRING), 'yyyyMM')) ORDER BY year;

Question: What is the yearly trend of trodelvy new patients in TNBC?
Correct Code: SELECT regimen_grouped_name, SUM(CASE WHEN new_patient_flag = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS new_patient_count FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` GROUP BY regimen_grouped_name ORDER BY new_patient_count DESC

Question: What is the monthly trend of R3M patient count in TNBC by each LOT in the past 1 year?
Correct Code: WITH Max_Date AS (SELECT MAX(CAST(Year_Month AS INT)) AS max_date FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE indication ILIKE 'TNBC'), Monthly_Patient_Count AS (SELECT TO_DATE(CAST(Year_Month AS STRING), 'yyyyMM') AS month, Line_of_Therapy_LOT AS LOT, SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS monthly_patients FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE CAST(Year_Month AS INT) >= (SELECT max_date FROM Max_Date) - 14 AND indication ILIKE 'TNBC' GROUP BY month, LOT), R3M_Patient_Trend AS (SELECT mc1.month, mc1.LOT, SUM(mc2.monthly_patients) AS r3m_patients FROM Monthly_Patient_Count mc1 JOIN Monthly_Patient_Count mc2 ON mc2.LOT = mc1.LOT AND mc2.month BETWEEN ADD_MONTHS(mc1.month, -2) AND mc1.month GROUP BY mc1.month, mc1.LOT) SELECT month, LOT, r3m_patients FROM R3M_Patient_Trend WHERE month >= ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(CAST((SELECT max_date FROM Max_Date) AS STRING), 'yyyyMM'), -12) ORDER BY month, LOT;

Question: How many prescribers treated at least one new Trodelvy patient each quarter over the past year in HR+/HER2-?
Correct Code: WITH MaxDate AS (SELECT MAX(CAST(Year_Month AS INT)) AS latest_date FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE indication ILIKE 'HR+/HER2-'), FilteredData AS (SELECT NPI_HCP_number, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(CAST(Year_Month AS STRING), 'yyyymm')) AS year, EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM TO_DATE(CAST(Year_Month AS STRING), 'yyyymm')) AS quarter, SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS monthly_adjusted_count FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE new_patient_flag = '1' AND LOWER(regimen_grouped_name) LIKE '%trodelvy%' AND CAST(Year_Month AS INT) >= (SELECT latest_date FROM MaxDate) - 12 AND indication ILIKE 'HR+/HER2-' GROUP BY NPI_HCP_number, Year_Month, quarter), QuarterlyCounts AS (SELECT NPI_HCP_number, COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(year, '-', quarter)) AS active_quarters FROM FilteredData GROUP BY NPI_HCP_number) SELECT COUNT(*) AS prescribers_treating_trodelvy_every_quarter FROM QuarterlyCounts WHERE active_quarters = 4;

Question: For mHR+ patients on trodelvy, what is the average age in 2023, 2024 & 2025?
Correct Code: WITH patient_data AS (SELECT Year, patient_birth_year, Monthly_Adjusted_Count FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE indication ILIKE 'HR+/HER2-' AND regimen_grouped_name ILIKE '%TRODELVY%' AND Year IN ('2023', '2024', '2025') AND patient_birth_year IS NOT NULL AND patient_birth_year != '0') SELECT Year, AVG(CAST(Year AS INT) - CAST(patient_birth_year AS INT)) AS avg_age, SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS total_patients FROM patient_data GROUP BY Year ORDER BY Year;

Question: what is the source of business share contributing to trodelvy in lot 2 during q2 2024 in hr+/her2-?
Correct Code: SELECT source_of_business, COUNT(*) AS nps_count FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE LOWER(regimen_grouped_name) LIKE '%trodelvy%' AND Line_of_Therapy_LOT = '2' AND Quarter = '2' AND Year = '2024' AND LOWER(TRIM(indication)) = LOWER('hr+/her2-') AND new_patient_flag = '1' GROUP BY source_of_business;

Question: calculate the top 10 parent decliners based on the sales growth percentage in recent 13 weeks for academic account type for the drug trodelvy
Correct Code: WITH filtered_data AS (SELECT week_end_date, parent_name, qty_sold_pu, top_parent_account_type, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM week_end_date) AS year, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM week_end_date) AS month FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`867_data_drug-trodelvy_for_genie_filtered_dates` WHERE LOWER(top_parent_account_type) = 'academic'), latest_date_cte AS (SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS latest_date FROM filtered_data), previous_week_cte AS (SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS previous_week_date FROM filtered_data WHERE week_end_date < (SELECT latest_date FROM latest_date_cte)), r13w_data AS (SELECT week_end_date, parent_name, qty_sold_pu FROM filtered_data WHERE week_end_date >= (SELECT previous_week_date FROM previous_week_cte) - INTERVAL 12 WEEK AND week_end_date <= (SELECT previous_week_date FROM previous_week_cte)) SELECT parent_name, SUM(qty_sold_pu) AS total_qty_sold FROM r13w_data GROUP BY parent_name ORDER BY total_qty_sold ASC LIMIT 10;

Question: How many patients are on CDK mono therapy?
Correct Code: WITH tnbc_cdk_mono AS ( SELECT SUM(`monthly_adjusted_count`) AS total_patients FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`tnbc_data_for_genie_preprocessed` WHERE `regimen_breakout` ILIKE '%CDK%' AND `regimen_breakout` NOT ILIKE '%+%' ), hr_cdk_mono AS ( SELECT SUM(`monthly_adjusted_count`) AS total_patients FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`mhr_data_for_genie_preprocessed` WHERE `regimen_breakout` ILIKE '%CDK%' AND `regimen_breakout` NOT ILIKE '%+%' ) -- Combine results for both TNBC and HR+/HER2- SELECT total_patients, 'TNBC' AS indication FROM tnbc_cdk_mono UNION ALL SELECT total_patients, 'HR+/HER2-' AS indication FROM hr_cdk_mono;

Question: How many patients are on 1L+ approved products?
Correct Code: WITH tnbc_approved AS ( SELECT SUM(`monthly_adjusted_count`) AS total_patients FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`tnbc_data_for_genie_preprocessed` WHERE `product_name` ILIKE '%Trodelvy%' OR `product_name` ILIKE '%Enhertu%' OR `product_name` ILIKE '%Talzenna%' OR `product_name` ILIKE '%Atezolizumab%' AND `monthly_adjusted_count` IS NOT NULL ), hr_approved AS ( SELECT SUM(`monthly_adjusted_count`) AS total_patients FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`mhr_data_for_genie_preprocessed` WHERE `product_name` ILIKE '%Trodelvy%' OR `product_name` ILIKE '%Enhertu%' OR `product_name` ILIKE '%Ibrance%' OR `product_name` ILIKE '%Kisqali%' OR `product_name` ILIKE '%Fulvestrant%' OR `product_name` ILIKE '%Orserdu%' OR `product_name` ILIKE '%Afinitor%' OR `product_name` ILIKE '%Piqray%' OR `product_name` ILIKE '%Talzenna%' OR `product_name` ILIKE '%Capecitabine%' AND `monthly_adjusted_count` IS NOT NULL ) SELECT total_patients, 'TNBC' AS indication FROM tnbc_approved UNION ALL SELECT total_patients, 'HR+/HER2-' AS indication FROM hr_approved;

Question: how are cdk mono and cdk combo drugs monthly trend
Correct Code: WITH latest_date AS ( SELECT MAX(CAST(Year_Month AS INT)) AS max_date FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` ), monthly_trend AS ( SELECT Year_Month, SUM(CASE WHEN regimen_breakout ILIKE '%CDK%' AND regimen_breakout NOT ILIKE '%+%' THEN Monthly_Adjusted_Count ELSE 0 END) AS cdk_mono_count, SUM(CASE WHEN regimen_breakout ILIKE '%CDK%' AND regimen_breakout ILIKE '%+%' THEN Monthly_Adjusted_Count ELSE 0 END) AS cdk_combo_count FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE CAST(Year_Month AS INT) >= (SELECT max_date - 11 FROM latest_date) GROUP BY Year_Month ) SELECT Year_Month, cdk_mono_count, cdk_combo_count, cdk_mono_count + cdk_combo_count AS total_cdk_count FROM monthly_trend ORDER BY Year_Month

Question: How many patients are tagged as 1L mTNBC?
Correct Code: WITH patient_count AS ( SELECT SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS total_patients FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE indication ILIKE 'TNBC' AND Line_of_Therapy_LOT = 1) SELECT ROUND(total_patients, 2) AS total_patients FROM patient_count;

Question: How many patients are on NCCN preferred neo/adjuvant chemo combinations across the entire available data period for both TNBC and HR+/HER2- indications?
Correct Code: WITH neo_adjuvant_patients AS ( SELECT patient_id, indication, regimen_name, 'Neo-Adjuvant' AS regimen_category, SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS patient_count FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE indication IN ('TNBC', 'HR+/HER2-') AND ( -- ACT: Anthracycline + Cyclophosphamide + Taxane ( (regimen_name ILIKE '%DOXORUBICIN%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%EPIRUBICIN%') AND regimen_name ILIKE '%CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE%' AND (regimen_name ILIKE '%PACLITAXEL%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%DOCETAXEL%') ) OR -- TC: Cyclophosphamide + Taxane (WITHOUT Anthracycline) ( regimen_name ILIKE '%CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE%' AND (regimen_name ILIKE '%PACLITAXEL%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%DOCETAXEL%') AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%DOXORUBICIN%' AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%EPIRUBICIN%' ) OR -- AC: Anthracycline + Cyclophosphamide (WITHOUT Taxane) ( (regimen_name ILIKE '%DOXORUBICIN%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%EPIRUBICIN%') AND regimen_name ILIKE '%CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE%' AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%PACLITAXEL%' AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%DOCETAXEL%' ) OR -- AC+T+Platinum: Anthracycline + Cyclophosphamide + Taxane + Platinum ( (regimen_name ILIKE '%DOXORUBICIN%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%EPIRUBICIN%') AND regimen_name ILIKE '%CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE%' AND (regimen_name ILIKE '%PACLITAXEL%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%DOCETAXEL%') AND regimen_name ILIKE '%CARBOPLATIN%' ) OR -- CMF: Cyclophosphamide + Methotrexate + Fluorouracil ( regimen_name ILIKE '%CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE%' AND regimen_name ILIKE '%METHOTREXATE%' AND regimen_name ILIKE '%FLUOROURACIL%' ) OR -- TAC: Taxane + Anthracycline + Cyclophosphamide (same as ACT) ( (regimen_name ILIKE '%DOXORUBICIN%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%EPIRUBICIN%') AND regimen_name ILIKE '%CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE%' AND (regimen_name ILIKE '%PACLITAXEL%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%DOCETAXEL%') ) OR -- Paclitaxel+Carboplatin (T+Platinum) ( (regimen_name ILIKE '%PACLITAXEL%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%DOCETAXEL%') AND regimen_name ILIKE '%CARBOPLATIN%' ) OR -- Keytruda + Chemo (Pembrolizumab/Keytruda WITH any chemotherapy) ( (regimen_name ILIKE '%PEMBROLIZUMAB%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%KEYTRUDA%') AND ( regimen_name ILIKE '%CHEMO%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%PACLITAXEL%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%DOCETAXEL%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%CARBOPLATIN%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%DOXORUBICIN%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%EPIRUBICIN%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%CAPECITABINE%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%METHOTREXATE%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%FLUOROURACIL%' ) ) ) GROUP BY patient_id, indication, regimen_name ), adjuvant_patients AS ( SELECT patient_id, indication, regimen_name, 'Adjuvant' AS regimen_category, SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS patient_count FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE indication IN ('TNBC', 'HR+/HER2-') AND ( -- ACT: Anthracycline + Cyclophosphamide + Taxane ( (regimen_name ILIKE '%DOXORUBICIN%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%EPIRUBICIN%') AND regimen_name ILIKE '%CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE%' AND (regimen_name ILIKE '%PACLITAXEL%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%DOCETAXEL%') ) OR -- TC: Cyclophosphamide + Taxane (WITHOUT Anthracycline) ( regimen_name ILIKE '%CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE%' AND (regimen_name ILIKE '%PACLITAXEL%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%DOCETAXEL%') AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%DOXORUBICIN%' AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%EPIRUBICIN%' ) OR -- AC: Anthracycline + Cyclophosphamide (WITHOUT Taxane) ( (regimen_name ILIKE '%DOXORUBICIN%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%EPIRUBICIN%') AND regimen_name ILIKE '%CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE%' AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%PACLITAXEL%' AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%DOCETAXEL%' ) OR -- AC+T+Platinum: Anthracycline + Cyclophosphamide + Taxane + Platinum ( (regimen_name ILIKE '%DOXORUBICIN%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%EPIRUBICIN%') AND regimen_name ILIKE '%CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE%' AND (regimen_name ILIKE '%PACLITAXEL%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%DOCETAXEL%') AND regimen_name ILIKE '%CARBOPLATIN%' ) OR -- CMF: Cyclophosphamide + Methotrexate + Fluorouracil ( regimen_name ILIKE '%CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE%' AND regimen_name ILIKE '%METHOTREXATE%' AND regimen_name ILIKE '%FLUOROURACIL%' ) OR -- TAC: Taxane + Anthracycline + Cyclophosphamide ( (regimen_name ILIKE '%DOXORUBICIN%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%EPIRUBICIN%') AND regimen_name ILIKE '%CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE%' AND (regimen_name ILIKE '%PACLITAXEL%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%DOCETAXEL%') ) OR -- Capecitabine (ANY regimen containing Capecitabine) ( regimen_name ILIKE '%CAPECITABINE%' ) OR -- Anthracycline (ANY regimen containing Anthracycline - broader definition) ( (regimen_name ILIKE '%DOXORUBICIN%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%EPIRUBICIN%') ) OR -- Taxane and Platinum agents (ANY combination with both) ( (regimen_name ILIKE '%PACLITAXEL%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%DOCETAXEL%') AND regimen_name ILIKE '%CARBOPLATIN%' ) OR -- Keytruda Mono (Pembrolizumab/Keytruda WITHOUT any chemotherapy) ( ( regimen_name = 'PEMBROLIZUMAB' OR regimen_name = 'KEYTRUDA' ) OR ( (regimen_name ILIKE '%PEMBROLIZUMAB%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%KEYTRUDA%') AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%CHEMO%' AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%PACLITAXEL%' AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%DOCETAXEL%' AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%CARBOPLATIN%' AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE%' AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%DOXORUBICIN%' AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%EPIRUBICIN%' AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%CAPECITABINE%' AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%METHOTREXATE%' AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%FLUOROURACIL%' ) ) ) GROUP BY patient_id, indication, regimen_name ) SELECT indication, regimen_category, SUM(patient_count) AS total_patient_count FROM ( SELECT * FROM neo_adjuvant_patients UNION ALL SELECT * FROM adjuvant_patients ) GROUP BY indication, regimen_category ORDER BY indication, regimen_category;

Question: How many patients are on NCCN preferred neo/ adjuvant chemo combinations?
Correct Code: WITH neo_adjuvant_patients AS ( SELECT patient_id, indication, regimen_name, 'Neo-Adjuvant' AS regimen_category, SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS patient_count FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE indication IN ('TNBC', 'HR+/HER2-') AND ( -- ACT: Anthracycline + Cyclophosphamide + Taxane ( (regimen_name ILIKE '%DOXORUBICIN%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%EPIRUBICIN%') AND regimen_name ILIKE '%CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE%' AND (regimen_name ILIKE '%PACLITAXEL%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%DOCETAXEL%') ) OR -- TC: Cyclophosphamide + Taxane (WITHOUT Anthracycline) ( regimen_name ILIKE '%CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE%' AND (regimen_name ILIKE '%PACLITAXEL%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%DOCETAXEL%') AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%DOXORUBICIN%' AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%EPIRUBICIN%' ) OR -- AC: Anthracycline + Cyclophosphamide (WITHOUT Taxane) ( (regimen_name ILIKE '%DOXORUBICIN%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%EPIRUBICIN%') AND regimen_name ILIKE '%CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE%' AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%PACLITAXEL%' AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%DOCETAXEL%' ) OR -- AC+T+Platinum: Anthracycline + Cyclophosphamide + Taxane + Platinum ( (regimen_name ILIKE '%DOXORUBICIN%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%EPIRUBICIN%') AND regimen_name ILIKE '%CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE%' AND (regimen_name ILIKE '%PACLITAXEL%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%DOCETAXEL%') AND regimen_name ILIKE '%CARBOPLATIN%' ) OR -- CMF: Cyclophosphamide + Methotrexate + Fluorouracil ( regimen_name ILIKE '%CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE%' AND regimen_name ILIKE '%METHOTREXATE%' AND regimen_name ILIKE '%FLUOROURACIL%' ) OR -- TAC: Taxane + Anthracycline + Cyclophosphamide (same as ACT) ( (regimen_name ILIKE '%DOXORUBICIN%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%EPIRUBICIN%') AND regimen_name ILIKE '%CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE%' AND (regimen_name ILIKE '%PACLITAXEL%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%DOCETAXEL%') ) OR -- Paclitaxel+Carboplatin (T+Platinum) ( (regimen_name ILIKE '%PACLITAXEL%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%DOCETAXEL%') AND regimen_name ILIKE '%CARBOPLATIN%' ) OR -- Keytruda + Chemo (Pembrolizumab/Keytruda WITH any chemotherapy) ( (regimen_name ILIKE '%PEMBROLIZUMAB%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%KEYTRUDA%') AND ( regimen_name ILIKE '%CHEMO%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%PACLITAXEL%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%DOCETAXEL%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%CARBOPLATIN%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%DOXORUBICIN%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%EPIRUBICIN%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%CAPECITABINE%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%METHOTREXATE%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%FLUOROURACIL%' ) ) ) GROUP BY patient_id, indication, regimen_name ), adjuvant_patients AS ( SELECT patient_id, indication, regimen_name, 'Adjuvant' AS regimen_category, SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS patient_count FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE indication IN ('TNBC', 'HR+/HER2-') AND ( -- ACT: Anthracycline + Cyclophosphamide + Taxane ( (regimen_name ILIKE '%DOXORUBICIN%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%EPIRUBICIN%') AND regimen_name ILIKE '%CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE%' AND (regimen_name ILIKE '%PACLITAXEL%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%DOCETAXEL%') ) OR -- TC: Cyclophosphamide + Taxane (WITHOUT Anthracycline) ( regimen_name ILIKE '%CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE%' AND (regimen_name ILIKE '%PACLITAXEL%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%DOCETAXEL%') AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%DOXORUBICIN%' AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%EPIRUBICIN%' ) OR -- AC: Anthracycline + Cyclophosphamide (WITHOUT Taxane) ( (regimen_name ILIKE '%DOXORUBICIN%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%EPIRUBICIN%') AND regimen_name ILIKE '%CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE%' AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%PACLITAXEL%' AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%DOCETAXEL%' ) OR -- AC+T+Platinum: Anthracycline + Cyclophosphamide + Taxane + Platinum ( (regimen_name ILIKE '%DOXORUBICIN%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%EPIRUBICIN%') AND regimen_name ILIKE '%CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE%' AND (regimen_name ILIKE '%PACLITAXEL%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%DOCETAXEL%') AND regimen_name ILIKE '%CARBOPLATIN%' ) OR -- CMF: Cyclophosphamide + Methotrexate + Fluorouracil ( regimen_name ILIKE '%CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE%' AND regimen_name ILIKE '%METHOTREXATE%' AND regimen_name ILIKE '%FLUOROURACIL%' ) OR -- TAC: Taxane + Anthracycline + Cyclophosphamide ( (regimen_name ILIKE '%DOXORUBICIN%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%EPIRUBICIN%') AND regimen_name ILIKE '%CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE%' AND (regimen_name ILIKE '%PACLITAXEL%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%DOCETAXEL%') ) OR -- Capecitabine (ANY regimen containing Capecitabine) ( regimen_name ILIKE '%CAPECITABINE%' ) OR -- Anthracycline (ANY regimen containing Anthracycline - broader definition) ( (regimen_name ILIKE '%DOXORUBICIN%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%EPIRUBICIN%') ) OR -- Taxane and Platinum agents (ANY combination with both) ( (regimen_name ILIKE '%PACLITAXEL%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%DOCETAXEL%') AND regimen_name ILIKE '%CARBOPLATIN%' ) OR -- Keytruda Mono (Pembrolizumab/Keytruda WITHOUT any chemotherapy) ( ( regimen_name = 'PEMBROLIZUMAB' OR regimen_name = 'KEYTRUDA' ) OR ( (regimen_name ILIKE '%PEMBROLIZUMAB%' OR regimen_name ILIKE '%KEYTRUDA%') AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%CHEMO%' AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%PACLITAXEL%' AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%DOCETAXEL%' AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%CARBOPLATIN%' AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%CYCLOPHOSPHAMIDE%' AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%DOXORUBICIN%' AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%EPIRUBICIN%' AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%CAPECITABINE%' AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%METHOTREXATE%' AND regimen_name NOT ILIKE '%FLUOROURACIL%' ) ) ) GROUP BY patient_id, indication, regimen_name ) SELECT indication, regimen_category, SUM(patient_count) AS total_patient_count FROM ( SELECT * FROM neo_adjuvant_patients UNION ALL SELECT * FROM adjuvant_patients ) GROUP BY indication, regimen_category ORDER BY indication, regimen_category;

Question: How many patients on Abemaciclib and Ribociclib are tagged as early stage patients?
Correct Code: WITH latest_data AS ( SELECT MAX(Year_Month) AS latest_month FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` ), early_stage_counts AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN LOWER(regimen_name) LIKE '%abemaciclib%' THEN 'Abemaciclib' WHEN LOWER(regimen_name) LIKE '%ribociclib%' THEN 'Ribociclib' END AS drug_name, SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS early_stage_patient_count FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE Year_Month = (SELECT latest_month FROM latest_data) AND Line_of_Therapy_LOT <= 0 AND (LOWER(regimen_name) LIKE '%abemaciclib%' OR LOWER(regimen_name) LIKE '%ribociclib%') GROUP BY CASE WHEN LOWER(regimen_name) LIKE '%abemaciclib%' THEN 'Abemaciclib' WHEN LOWER(regimen_name) LIKE '%ribociclib%' THEN 'Ribociclib' END ) SELECT drug_name, early_stage_patient_count, DATE_FORMAT((SELECT latest_month FROM latest_data), 'yyyy-MM') AS latest_month FROM early_stage_counts ORDER BY drug_name

Question: how many early stage patients are there in 2024?
Correct Code: SELECT SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS early_stage_patient_count FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE Year = '2024' AND Line_of_Therapy_LOT <= 0

Question: how many late stage patients are there in 2024?
Correct Code: SELECT SUM(Monthly_Adjusted_Count) AS early_stage_patient_count FROM `commercial-us-apo-onc-iia-dev`.`setuserv_adhocs`.`onc_claims_data` WHERE Year = '2024' AND Line_of_Therapy_LOT > 0
